displayTitle: Star Wars (1977) #02: Six Against the Galaxy
synopsis: Part two of the six-part adaptation of *A New Hope*. Luke Skywalker is rescued from an attacking band of Sand People by Obi-Wan Kenobi. Once Luke, Obi-Wan, and the droids R2-D2 and C-3PO are safely inside Kenobi's hut, R2-D2 plays a recorded message from Princess Leia Organa asking Kenobi to bring the droid and its critical information to Alderaan. Luke at first refuses to go, citing his obligations at home, but on discovering that his farm has been destroyed and his aunt Beru and uncle Owen killed by Imperial stormtroopers, he agrees. They hire Han Solo and Chewbacca to fly them to Alderaan aboard the *Millennium Falcon*.
title: Star Wars (1977) #02: Six Against the Galaxy
